name: Aidan Gomez
key_contributions: Co-authored "Attention Is All You Need" (2017) — introduced the Transformer architecture (as an intern at Google Brain)
Co-founded Cohere in 2019, building enterprise-focused large language models
Youngest co-author of the Transformer paper
Led Cohere to become a leading enterprise AI company
summary: Aidan Gomez is a co-author of 'Attention Is All You Need' (2017) and the co-founder of Cohere. He was an intern at Google Brain when the Transformer paper was written, making him the youngest of the eight co-authors. He went on to co-found Cohere in 2019, which has become one of the leading enterprise AI companies, building large language models focused on business applications rather than consumer chatbots.
